text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
298 

REDUCED_COST_SHARE 
LABEL: 
Indicates Whether Part D Plan Offers Reduced Cost-Sharing 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the plan offers reduced Part D cost-sharing as part of its supplemental 
Part D benefit. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not applicable 
COMMENT: 
This variable applies to Enhanced
